_readme: Tool catalog for artifacial.io — Elijah's own AI Character & Video Studio venture (face-swap / image-to-video). The artifacial-ad-ideator skill fans over `tools` and DRAFTS one analytics-grounded ad concept per tool as a vault idea-note (DRAFT ONLY — never posts, zero ad spend). Each entry: `name` (tool label), `slug` (kebab id, stable join key), `what` (one-line capability), `ad_angle` (the seed pain/desire this tool sells against — a starting hook, NOT a finished ad), `verified` (true = confirmed on the live site at `_fetched`, '_unverified' string = plausible seed entry to confirm before use). Edit freely; the skill validates parse + tolerates missing optional fields. Tool list is a point-in-time snapshot — re-fetch artifacial.io and update when the product changes.
_venture: Artifacial — listed in obsidian/Elijah's vault/CLAUDE.md active ventures; AI Character & Video Studio. Free tier observed: 3 generations on sign-up.

tools.name: Face Swap
tools.what: Applies your face onto any existing footage or video clip.
tools.ad_angle: Put yourself in any scene you could never film — no camera, no crew.

tools.name: Image to Video
tools.what: Turns a single still photo into a cinematic moving video sequence.
tools.ad_angle: One photo becomes a moving cinematic shot — bring a dead image to life.

tools.name: Motion Transfer
tools.what: Transfers movement and poses from reference footage onto your character.
tools.ad_angle: Steal the exact movement from any clip and run it on your own character.

tools.name: Character Swap
tools.what: Substitutes a different character model while keeping consistency across the shot.
tools.ad_angle: Recast the lead of any video without reshooting a single frame.

tools.name: Lip Sync
tools.what: Synchronizes mouth movement to any audio track or line of dialogue.
tools.ad_angle: Make any character say anything — perfectly matched mouth to audio.

tools.name: Upscale
tools.what: Enhances video resolution and detail to clean 1080p cinematic output.
tools.ad_angle: Turn a blurry low-res clip into sharp 1080p you'd actually post.

tools.name: End-Frame Control
tools.what: Directs the exact final frame — position and composition of where the shot lands.
tools.ad_angle: Decide exactly where a generated shot ENDS instead of rolling the dice.

tools.name: Motion Templates
tools.what: Pre-built camera/movement patterns you drop onto a scene to direct it.
tools.ad_angle: Pro camera moves on tap — no rig, no operator, no film-school degree.

tools.name: Prompt Enhancer
tools.what: Refines a rough text description into a stronger prompt for better scene outcomes.
tools.ad_angle: Bad prompt in, great scene out — the model writes the prompt for you.
